name: BoundingBox2D
summary: 2D boundingBox Representation class for 2D bounding box.

constructors.name: BoundingBox2D(angle)
constructors.summary: Default constructor. min point is initialized to [DBL_MAX,DBL_MAX], max point to [-DBL_MAX,-DBL_MAX],
constructors.remarks: Default constructor. min point is initialized to [DBL_MAX,DBL_MAX], max point to [-DBL_MAX,-DBL_MAX],

params.name: angle
params.doc: Angle of new initialized bounding box.

constructors.name: BoundingBox2D(min, max, angle)
constructors.summary: Set constructor Initialize bounding box with given MIN, MAX points and slew of local coordinate system.
constructors.remarks: Set constructor Initialize bounding box with given MIN, MAX points and slew of local coordinate system.

params.name: min
params.doc: minimum point in local coordinate system

params.name: max
params.doc: maximum point in local coordinate system

params.name: angle
params.doc: direction of X axis of local coordinate system

methods.name: Deflate(x, y)
methods.summary: Deflate in x and y axis
methods.remarks: Deflate in x and y axis

methods.name: Deflate(size)
methods.summary: Deflate in x,y axis concurrently.
methods.remarks: Deflate in x,y axis concurrently.

params.name: size
params.doc: deflate in x and y axis concurrently.

methods.name: Inflate(x, y)
methods.summary: Inflate in x and y axis
methods.remarks: Inflate in x and y axis

methods.name: Inflate(size)
methods.summary: Inflate in x,y axis concurrently.
methods.remarks: Inflate in x,y axis concurrently.

params.name: size
params.doc: inflate in x and y axis concurrently.

methods.name: IsContaining(point)
methods.summary: Is point inside this box
methods.remarks: Is point inside this box

returns.doc: true, if is inside, otherwise false

methods.name: IsContaining(box)
methods.summary: Is box inside this box
methods.remarks: Is box inside this box

returns.doc: true, if is inside, otherwise false

methods.name: IsContaining(minmax)
methods.summary: Is minmax box inside this box
methods.remarks: Is minmax box inside this box

returns.doc: true, if is inside, otherwise false

methods.name: Overlaps(box)
methods.summary: Does box overlap this box
methods.remarks: Does box overlap this box

returns.doc: true, if boxes overlap, otherwise false

methods.name: Overlaps(minmax)
methods.summary: Does minmax box overlap this box
methods.remarks: Does minmax box overlap this box

returns.doc: true, if boxes overlap, otherwise false

methods.name: __add__(boundingBox)
methods.summary: Expand BoundingBox2D box. Expands the BoundingBox2D box by the box given in parameter minmax
methods.remarks: Expand BoundingBox2D box. Expands the BoundingBox2D box by the box given in parameter minmax

methods.name: __add__(minMax)
methods.summary: Expand BoundingBox2D box by given MinMax2D. Expands the BoundingBox2D box by the minmax box given in parameter minmax
methods.remarks: Expand BoundingBox2D box by given MinMax2D. Expands the BoundingBox2D box by the minmax box given in parameter minmax

methods.name: __iadd__(boundingBox)
methods.summary: Expand BoundingBox2D box. Expands the BoundingBox2D box by the box given in parameter minmax
methods.remarks: Expand BoundingBox2D box. Expands the BoundingBox2D box by the box given in parameter minmax

methods.name: __iadd__(minmax)
methods.summary: Expand BoundingBox2D box by given MinMax2D. Expands the BoundingBox2D box by the minmax box given in parameter minmax
methods.remarks: Expand BoundingBox2D box by given MinMax2D. Expands the BoundingBox2D box by the minmax box given in parameter minmax

methods.name: __iadd__(point)
methods.summary: Expand BoundingBox2D box. Expands the BoundingBox2D box by the Point2D given in parameter point
methods.remarks: Expand BoundingBox2D box. Expands the BoundingBox2D box by the Point2D given in parameter point

params.name: point
params.doc: Point2D to be added in world coordinate system

methods.summary: Get minimum point, maximum point and angle
methods.remarks: Get minimum point, maximum point and angle

returns.doc: minimum point in local coordinate system,

methods.summary: Get direction of X axis of new coordinate system
methods.remarks: Get direction of X axis of new coordinate system

returns.doc: angle direction of X axis of new coordinate system

methods.summary: Get world point of a dedicated location of the box
methods.remarks: Get world point of a dedicated location of the box

methods.name: GetCenter
methods.summary: Get box center point in local coordinate system
methods.remarks: Get box center point in local coordinate system

returns.doc: center point in local coordinates system

methods.summary: Get world point at center of box
methods.remarks: Get world point at center of box

methods.summary: Get height of box in local system
methods.remarks: Get height of box in local system

methods.summary: Get maximum point in local coordinate system
methods.remarks: Get maximum point in local coordinate system

returns.doc: maximum point in local coordinate system

methods.name: GetMaxPoint
methods.summary: Get world point at maximum of box
methods.remarks: Get world point at maximum of box

methods.summary: Get minimum point in local coordinate system
methods.remarks: Get minimum point in local coordinate system

methods.summary: Get world point at maximum of box
methods.remarks: Get world point at maximum of box

methods.name: GetWidth
methods.summary: Get width of box in local system
methods.remarks: Get width of box in local system

methods.name: IsValid
methods.summary: Test if box is valid
methods.remarks: Test if box is valid

returns.doc: true, if box valid, otherwise false

methods.name: Reset
methods.summary: Reset bounding box and set initial angle When bounding box is reseted, then min point is initialized to [DBL_MAX,DBL_MAX], max point to [-DBL_MAX,-DBL_MAX], This method is using when previous initialized bounding box start accept a new point values.
methods.remarks: Reset bounding box and set initial angle When bounding box is reseted, then min point is initialized to [DBL_MAX,DBL_MAX], max point to [-DBL_MAX,-DBL_MAX], This method is using when previous initialized bounding box start accept a new point values.

methods.name: Set
methods.summary: Set minimum point, maximum point and angle
methods.remarks: Set minimum point, maximum point and angle

params.name: min
params.doc: minimum point in local coordinate system

params.name: max
params.doc: maximum point in local coordinate system

params.name: angle
params.doc: angle between world X and local X coordinate system

methods.name: SetAngle
methods.summary: Set direction of X axis of new coordinate system
methods.remarks: Set direction of X axis of new coordinate system

params.name: angle
params.doc: direction of X axis of new coordinate system

methods.name: SetHeight
methods.summary: Set height of box in local system. Computed from Min point
methods.remarks: Set height of box in local system. Computed from Min point

methods.name: SetMax
methods.summary: Set maximum point in local coordinate system
methods.remarks: Set maximum point in local coordinate system

methods.name: SetMin
methods.summary: Set minimum point
methods.remarks: Set minimum point

params.name: min
params.doc: minimum point in local coordinate system

methods.name: SetWidth
methods.summary: Set width of box in local system. Computed from Min point
methods.remarks: Set width of box in local system. Computed from Min point

methods.name: __eq__
methods.summary: Comparison of boundingBoxs without tolerance. Be careful, this method work without tolerance!
methods.remarks: Comparison of boundingBoxs without tolerance. Be careful, this method work without tolerance!

returns.doc: True when boundingBoxs are equal, otherwise false.

methods.name: __getitem__
methods.summary: Get the corners of bounding box. This method is checked and throwing Geometry::Exception when index is out of range.
methods.remarks: Get the corners of bounding box. This method is checked and throwing Geometry::Exception when index is out of range.

params.name: index
params.doc: corner index (0-left bottom, 1-right bottom, 2-right top, 3-left top)

returns.doc: corner as Point2D in world coordinate system.

methods.name: __repr__
methods.summary: Convert the list to a string
methods.remarks: Convert the list to a string
